items.headline: R2 Launch, 5G Partnership, Georgia Expansion Might Change The Case For Investing In Rivian (RIVN)
items.summary: Rivian Automotive has already begun public deliveries of its lower-priced R2 mid-size SUV from its Normal, Illinois plant, while extending its AT&T partnership to add built-in 5G connectivity and planning additional capacity at a future Georgia facility. This move marks Rivian’s push beyond the premium niche into the mass-market EV segment, where management is targeting gross margin positive R2 units and leveraging software-enabled features to support longer-term financial resilience. items.summary: AT&T Inc. (NYSE:T) ranks among the best 5G stocks to buy right now. AT&T Inc. (NYSE:T) announced on June 3 that it will begin streamlining its fiber home internet options, limiting choices to four speed levels and offering bundle savings to customers who mix internet and wireless phone services. items.headline: Rivian AT&T 5G Deal Puts R2 Software And Valuation In Focus
items.summary: Rivian Automotive (NasdaqGS:RIVN) has agreed a major partnership with AT&T to bring dedicated 5G connectivity to its next generation R2 vehicle platform. The collaboration is aimed at supporting software defined features, over the air updates and new connected services for drivers. The 5G rollout is expected to underpin real time AI powered functions and richer infotainment inside future Rivian vehicles.
